title: Manager, FEWB Trade, Asia-Pacific
description:
Job Description:

  • In conjunction with Director to develop and support FEWB trade.
  • Work directly with Ocean Procurement team and management to develop pricing and business/product development strategies to win new business and maximize profitability.
  • Analyze market conditions to help facilitate deal-making and enable proactive guidance of the commercial organization to drive closing ratios and margin improvement.
  • Grow volume and foster trade development based on a clear plan (strategic and transactional) which enables businesses to grow sustainably, healthy and in line with the assigned trade budget.
  • Provide competitive buying rates for existing and potential businesses.
  • Prepare pricing instructions, matrices, and bid instructions for RFQs.
  • Manage carrier allocation programs/ capacity management.
  • Determine allocation shipping line, trade, and accounts.
  • Escalation point for operational support once local escalation has been exhausted with no result.
  • Maintain and develop relationships with key business partners (shipping lines).
  • Furnish statistical support and data analysis related to ocean activities.
  • Administer ocean contracts and amendments and communicate as appropriate.
  • Optimize procurement activities, ensure an optimal GP, support local trade teams to achieve best procurement results as well as optimal pricing with customers.
  • Maturing and accelerating carrier relationship management.
  • Achievement of the committed carrier budgets as well as ensuring carrier allocation safeguarding.
  • Engagement with sales and ocean product teams in the countries.
  • Quarterly meetings with key vendors to discuss scorecards and future business direction.
  • Other duties as assigned by Director.
  • Adhere to the Code of Conduct policy of the DSV Group.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business, Supply Chain Management, Logistics, or related field
  • At least 12-15 years of experience in transportation and logistics procurement & trade management, preferably in a global organization
  • Knowledge of and experience in the FEWB trade
  • Strong procurement & negotiation skills
  • Trade / business development skills
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
  • Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
  • Knowledge of procurement best practices and industry trends
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office suite 
  • Proficient in procurement software and tools
  • Knowledge of ERP systems and data analytics tools is a plus

postedCompany.description:
Company Overview

Do you want to be part of something 60,000 times bigger than you?

That’s how many colleagues you’ll have on a journey towards connecting the world and making your mark.


DSV provides and manages supply chain solutions for thousands of companies every day – from the small family run business to the large global corporation.


We are freight forwarders, salespeople, accountants, fork lift drivers, IT engineers, specialists and countless others – and we all made the choice to forward our careers.


We believe that people are able to achieve their potential if they take ownership of their own career. That’s why we’ll give you every opportunity to do just that.


People are at the core of who we are - the drive, talent and devotion they bring to the table every day are what make DSV the exciting place it is. It’s a dynamic and fast-moving environment with rapid decisions at every level – where ambition meets teamwork in an effort to face challenges, succeed, move forward and make a difference.


We care about your opportunity to influence the path of your career, whether you want to advance locally or look for adventures abroad. With a massive global reach and offices in more than 90 countries, the opportunities are plenty.


If you have the right drive, the right talent and enjoy responsibility, we’ll give you the support you need to explore the reach of your potential.


DSV is organized into three divisions – Air & Sea, Road and Solutions – offering the complete range of services to support our customer’s entire supply chain.


In Asia Pacific, we have 68 office locations employing 6,000 people engaged in core activities in Air Freight, Sea Freight, Road, Rail and Projects.


We're looking for people who want to make a difference. If that's you, then we want to hear from you!


Join us and forward your career at DSV.
postedCompany.name: DSV AIR & SEA SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D16 Upper East Coast, Bedok, Eastwood, Kew Drive
